description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the dbkblk/rand_tools:launcher Docker image. Define a single job named Launcher that runs in the default test stage. The job executes the command `i686-w64-mingw32.static-qmake-qt5 rand_launcher.pro && make` to generate a Qt5 Makefile for a Windows 32‑bit target and then builds it. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are configured.
